title: 60pcs 12 Inch Black White & Silver Balloons, Sliver & Black Balloons Set with Confetti Helium Latex for Wedding, Anniversary, Birthday Party Graduation Parties Decorations
features: Silver and black balloon sets: 20 x black balloons, 20 x silver balloons, 20 x white balloons with silver confetti. Total 60 pieces. Enough quantity for you to create a distinctive silver and white balloon arch garland kit or balloon bouquet to meet your usage scenarios.
BALLOON MEASUREMENT The silver and black balloon set is 30cm when fully inflated.
Premium quality: these shiny and chrome-plated 12 inch party balloons are made of high-quality latex and are safe to use around children. You can fill them with air, water or helium.

How to make a confetti balloon: For your convenience, our clear balloons are pre-filled with shiny confetti, you simply rub the balloons on your hair, a towel or similar so that the confetti sticks to the sides and then enjoy your happy time.

Perfect party accessory: the silver and black balloon arch can be used by any age anywhere and anytime. Add these vibrant colors to your party, such as Mother's Day, bridal showers, Halloween, Christmas, New Year's Day, farewell party, bachelorette party, etc.
description: Black Silver Balloons Sliver and Black Balloons Arch Kit Helium Balloons Latex Balloons Sliver and Black Party Decorations Birthday Decorations Anniversary WeddingSpecifications:Material: Latex & plastic confettiSize: 12 Inches / 30 cm in diameterWide Usage: White and Sliver party decorationsPackage included:20 x Black Balloons20 x Sliver Balloons20 x Sliver Confetti BalloonsFeatures:Sliver and Black Party Decorations:Sliver and black balloons decorations for galas, weddings, bridal showers, graduation, christmas, spring festival, engagement parties, anniversaries, new years eve, wedding, birthday party, hen party and so on. Perfect table center pieces, wall decor, displays, photo, makes your party attractive and romantic.How to Make a Confetti Balloon:White balloons filled with sliver confetti. As the white confetti is heavier than the helium, will naturally moves toward the direction of gravity. So, before inflating the balloon, spray a little bit of water into the balloon and rub the confetti with your hands repeatedly to distribute them uniform inside the balloon, so that the moisture helps the pieces of white confetti stick to the balloon.
